Our Services in Coimbatore

19 services across six practice areas — GST, income tax, accounting, payroll, incorporation and MSME certification — all delivered by one Coimbatore-based team.

01

GST Advisory & Compliance

End-to-end GST support for Coimbatore businesses — registration, returns, notice replies, appeals, refunds and cancellations, handled by an Enrolled GST Practitioner.

6 services →
02

Direct Tax & Income Tax Advisory

Income tax return filing for individuals, firms and companies, plus complete TDS/TCS compliance, from a Coimbatore-based practice that tracks every Finance Act change.

2 services →
03

Accounting & Financial Reporting

Monthly bookkeeping, MIS reporting and statutory financial statements that keep Coimbatore MSMEs, traders and manufacturers audit-ready all year round.

1 services →
04

Payroll, Labour Law & Statutory HR Compliance

Payroll processing, PF/ESI, Professional Tax and contract labour compliance for Coimbatore employers — mills, factories, IT firms and retail establishments alike.

4 services →
05

Business Incorporation & Corporate Compliance

Private Limited, OPC, Section 8 and LLP incorporation for Coimbatore founders, followed by disciplined ROC annual filings and secretarial compliance.

3 services →
06

MSME, Trade & Digital Certification Services

Udyam registration, Import Export Code and Digital Signature Certificates to get Coimbatore MSMEs and exporters trade-ready and digitally compliant.

3 services →
Full list

Every service, A to Z

GST Registration

New GST registration, amendments and composition scheme registration for Coimbatore businesses, handled start to finish by an Enrolled GST Practitioner.

GST Return Filing (Monthly, Quarterly & Annual)

GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, QRMP, IFF and GSTR-9/9C filing for Coimbatore businesses, with reconciliation against purchase registers and e-way bills before every filing.

GST Notice & Scrutiny Response

Replies to ASMT-10, ASMT-11, DRC-01A, DRC-01 and DRC-07 notices for Coimbatore businesses, backed by reconciliation working papers and statutory citations.

GST Appeals & Litigation Support

First appeal drafting under Section 107, GSTAT representation support and pre-deposit computation for Coimbatore businesses contesting adverse GST orders.

GST Refund Assistance

Export refunds, inverted duty structure refunds and excess cash ledger refunds filed and tracked for Coimbatore exporters and manufacturers.

GST Cancellation & Revocation

Voluntary GST cancellation, final return filing, and revocation of registrations cancelled by the department, for Coimbatore businesses closing or reviving operations.

Income Tax Return Filing — Individuals, Firms, Companies & Presumptive Taxation

ITR filing for salaried individuals, professionals, partnership firms, LLPs and companies in Coimbatore, including presumptive taxation under Sections 44AD/44ADA/44AE.

TDS/TCS Return Filing & Compliance

Quarterly TDS returns (24Q, 26Q, 27Q, 27EQ), TCS compliance, lower-deduction certificates and Form 16/16A generation for Coimbatore employers and businesses.

Accounting & Bookkeeping Services

Monthly bookkeeping, MIS reports and statutory financial statements for Coimbatore traders, manufacturers and service businesses, aligned to GST and income tax filings.

Payroll Processing & Statutory Compliance

Monthly payroll processing with PF, ESI, Professional Tax and TDS deductions computed and remitted correctly for Coimbatore employers of every size.

PF & ESI Registration and Periodic Returns

EPFO and ESIC registration, monthly PF/ESI returns, and inspection support for Coimbatore employers crossing the applicability threshold.

Professional Tax Registration & Remittance

Professional Tax Enrolment Certificate (PTEC) and Registration Certificate (PTRC) for Coimbatore businesses and professionals, with periodic remittance and returns.

Labour Law Advisory & Contract Labour Compliance

Shops & Establishments licensing, Contract Labour (Regulation & Abolition) Act registration, and labour code transition advisory for Coimbatore employers.

Company Incorporation — Private Limited, OPC, Section 8

Private Limited Company, One Person Company and Section 8 (non-profit) incorporation for Coimbatore founders, filed through SPICe+ with MOA/AOA drafting.

LLP Registration & Compliance

LLP incorporation, LLP agreement drafting and annual filings (Form 8, Form 11) for Coimbatore professional firms and small businesses.

ROC Annual Filings & Corporate Secretarial Compliance

AOC-4, MGT-7/7A, DIR-3 KYC and board resolution compliance for Coimbatore private limited companies and OPCs, plus ROC query responses.

Udyam (MSME) Registration

Udyam registration and re-classification for Coimbatore MSMEs, unlocking collateral-free loans, delayed payment protection and government tender benefits.

Import Export Code (IEC) Registration

IEC registration and modification for Coimbatore exporters and importers, linked correctly to PAN and bank details for smooth customs and bank processing.

Digital Signature Certificate (DSC)

Class 3 DSC issuance for directors, partners and authorised signatories in Coimbatore, for MCA, GST, income tax and tender filings.

Covai Accounting Services

GST Practitioner (Enrolment No. 331800001760GPU) · GSTIN 33AAWFC3995L1ZM · serving Coimbatore since 2012. 4.9★ rated on Google.

Operating under two trade names: Covai Accounting Services (primary practice) and Covai GST Consultants (dedicated GST compliance unit).

Call/WhatsApp: +91 90957 23458 (Primary) · +91 81227 60695 (Alternate)

352, Mullai Nagar, Opp. Vallalar Hospital, Maruthamalai Main Road, Vadavalli, Coimbatore – 641041
